name: Volage
tagline: A cigar that doesn't wait for an occasion.
homeLede: An elegant, slow-burning journey for the senses. It opens with a remarkably creamy profile, seamlessly transitioning into layers of earth, wood, and dark coffee. A soft sweetness lingers on the palate just as a sophisticated spice emerges.
Cultivated in the shadow of the Argopuro range, the filler leverages Java's volcanic terroir, offering a unique Indonesian expression of classic Havana-seed tobacco.

signature.lede: Each Mariposa wears 24-carat gold, laid by hand.
signature.paragraph: The leaf is applied by Wrights of Lymm, the British supplier whose gold has dressed Westminster, Versailles, and St Paul's. On a Mariposa, the same craft is brought to the band of a single cigar. The reasoning is the brand's: the finer things are meant to be enjoyed, not waited for.
signature.placeholderCaption: PLACEHOLDER: Macro shot of 24-carat gold leaf on Volage cigar, ideally application in progress or freshly applied.

origin.label: Argopuro
origin.copy: Volcanic soil at the foot of an East Javan range. Havana-seed tobacco, learning what Indonesia tastes like.
origin.placeholderCaption: PLACEHOLDER: Argopuro range, East Java — tobacco field or volcanic landscape.

origin.label: Jember
origin.copy: Hand-rolled by torcedoras in the BIN workshop. Entubado bunching, three-part construction, Cuban triple cap.
origin.placeholderCaption: PLACEHOLDER: Jember rolling room — torcedoras at work, hands and leaf.

origin.label: Time
origin.copy: Twenty-four months of fermentation. Twelve months of ageing. Then the leaf goes on.
origin.placeholderCaption: PLACEHOLDER: Ageing room — rows of bundled cigars in maturation.

narrative: A Canonazo, hand-rolled in Java from Havana-seed Criollo 98 grown in the volcanic soil at the foot of the Argopuro range. Full-bodied, slow-burning, forty-five minutes of evolution.
The first draw is creamy and slow. Wood arrives, then coffee, then a sweetness that holds while the spice walks in. A cigar that does not wait for an occasion.

specs.label: Construction
specs.value: Three-part · entubado bunching · Cuban triple cap

tasting.note: Creamy and woody, grounded by an underlying note of coffee.
The creaminess lingers as a rich sweetness begins to emerge.
Spice arrives, the sweetness holds, and deep earth closes the smoke.

packaging.placeholderCaption: PLACEHOLDER: Single Volage cigar in presentation packaging — closed box, front three-quarter view.
PLACEHOLDER: Packaging detail — band and gold-leaf at close range, paired with the postcard insert.
PLACEHOLDER: Packaging open — box interior with cigar in situ, postcard visible.
